title.en: SEI Safety Standard Record Updated For International Review
title.zh: SEI 安全标准资料更新，支持国际项目评审

excerpt.en: The SEI safety standard record has been updated to support clearer project review for overseas buyers and internal teams.
excerpt.zh: SEI 安全标准资料已更新，可为海外客户和内部团队提供更清晰的项目评审依据。

body.en:
Yaoshun has updated its SEI safety standard record to support international project review and customer-side internal checks.

The value of safety documentation is that different teams can discuss product scope, sample status, and next steps from the same reference.

A clearer baseline for safety review

The updated record can serve as a safety reference for current toy projects, helping customers confirm the basic file before deeper discussion.

For overseas projects, document clarity affects how efficiently sourcing, compliance, and category teams communicate.

Internal answers stay more consistent

Quality, project, and commercial teams can answer customer questions from the same record, reducing the risk of different roles giving different explanations.

Better prepared for follow-up checks

Many overseas projects go through secondary review after the first submission. Updating the file in advance keeps the project better prepared for those later checks.

Safety Files Should Be Easy For Overseas Teams To Read

Overseas customers often send product images, test files, packaging information, and supplier files to internal teams together. Clear file names, versions, and matching products make review smoother.

Review These Points During Buyer Approval

Check pointReviewPractical use
File versionDate, number, applicable productReduces repeated questions
Product matchSample images, configuration, packaging versionHelps reviewers understand scope quickly
Market needsTarget country, channel requirement, additional filesShows whether more documents are needed

Make International Review More Direct

For qualification files, test reports, supplier audits, or export documents, review compliance information, match the file with the right SKU through products, and send the document list through the contact page.

View ComplianceBrowse ProductsSend File Request
body.zh:
尧顺已完成 SEI 安全标准相关资料更新，用于支持国际项目评审和客户内部审核。

安全资料的价值，在于让不同团队能围绕同一份依据讨论产品范围、样品状态和后续准备。

建立更清楚的安全评审基线

更新后的资料可作为当前玩具项目的安全参考，帮助客户在深入讨论前先确认基础文件。

对海外项目而言，文件清楚度会影响采购、合规和品类团队之间的沟通效率。

内部回复也更一致

品质、项目和商务人员可以基于同一套资料回复客户问题，降低不同岗位给出不同说法的风险。

更好应对后续复核

很多海外项目在首次提交后还会经历二次复核。资料提前更新好，能让项目在后续检查中保持更充分的准备。

安全标准资料要便于海外团队阅读

海外客户审核资料时，通常会把产品图片、测试文件、包装信息和供应商资料一起转给内部团队。资料名称、版本和对应产品越清楚，沟通越顺。

客户审核时可以重点核对

核对项建议查看实际作用
资料版本文件日期、编号、适用产品减少重复询问
产品对应样品图片、配置、包装版本让审核人员快速理解范围
市场要求目标国家、渠道要求、补充文件提前判断是否需要更多资料

让国际评审少走弯路

如需进一步确认资质、测试报告、供应商审核或出口文件，可先查看 资质合规页面，再结合 产品中心 选择对应 SKU，并通过 联系页面 提交文件清单。

查看资质合规浏览产品提交文件需求
